title: phlomis × composita f. trullenquei
intro: Phlomis × composita f. trullenquei is a rare, hybrid species of perennial flowering plant within the Lamiaceae family, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phlomis × composita f. trullenquei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
